    constructor <;> linarith [pi_gt_three, pi_lt_four]
  have c50 : ⌈sqrt 50⌉ = 8 := by
    apply Int.ceil_eq_iff.mpr
    constructor <;> norm_num
  rw [cpi, c50]
  norm_num

have h8 : 8 ^ (1 / 3 : ℝ) = 2 := by norm_num
  rw [h8, h₀ 2 (not_irrational_rat 2), h₁ (-Real.pi) (Irrational.neg irrational_pi),
    h₁ (Real.sqrt 50) (irrational_sqrt.mpr (by norm_num)), h₀ (9 / 2) (not_irrational_rat (9 / 2))]
  have r1 : ⌈-Real.pi⌉ = -3 := Int.ceil_eq_iff.mpr ⟨by linarith [Real.pi_gt_three], by linarith [Real.pi_lt_four]⟩
  have r2 : ⌈Real.sqrt 50⌉ = 8 := Int.ceil_eq_iff.mpr ⟨by rw [Real.lt_sqrt (by norm_num) (by norm_num)]; norm_num, by rw [Real.sqrt_le (by norm_num) (by norm_num)]; norm_num⟩
  rw [r1, r2]
  norm_num

show ⌈Real.sqrt 50⌉ = 8 by (apply Int.ceil_eq_iff.mpr; constructor <;> norm_num)]; norm_num
  have h4 : f (9 / 2) = 4 := by
    rw [h₀ (9 / 2) (by use 9 / 2; norm_num)]; norm_num
  rw [h1, h2, h3, h4]; norm_num
